accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.name: Name
accounts.emptyState: You don't have any accounts. Create your first one to get started.
accounts.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this account?
accounts.hasTransactions: Cannot delete because it has active transactions.

categories.title: Categories
categories.name: Name
categories.emptyState: You don't have any categories. Create your first one to get started.
categories.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this category?

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.emptyState: You don't have any transactions. Create your first one to get started.
transactions.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this transaction?
transactions.deleteDebtWarning: This will also delete all associated settlements.
transactions.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, description, or reference…

debtsSummary.title: Debts and loans
debtsSummary.subtitle: Summary grouped by person (reference)
debtsSummary.emptyPending: No pending debts. All caught up.

bulkSettle.title: Settle everything with {name} ({currency})
bulkSettle.intro: You'll process {count, plural, one {# pending transaction} other {# pending transactions}} in {currency}.

real.title: Real payment
real.description: Creates account movements (expenses for debts, income for loans) and updates your balance.
real.summary: You'll generate {count, plural, one {# settlement} other {# settlements}} for a total of {total} from {account}.
real.noEligibleAccount: You don't have any active account in {currency}. Create one or use informal close.

informal.title: Informal close
informal.description: Just marks them settled. Doesn't touch your accounts or move money. Useful when you already squared up face-to-face.

bulkSettle.successReal: Debts with {name} in {currency} settled and recorded in your account
bulkSettle.successInformal: Debts with {name} in {currency} marked as settled

errors.ACC_002: You already have an account with that name
errors.ACC_003: Cannot delete: account has active transactions
errors.ACC_004: You don't have access to this account
errors.CAT_002: You already have a category with that name for this type
errors.CAT_003: You don't have access to this category
errors.TXN_004: Cannot transfer to the same account
errors.TXN_010: This debt/loan has already been settled
errors.TXN_013: New amount cannot be less than what has already been settled
errors.HAB_002: You already have a habit with that name
errors.HAB_005: Target count must be at least 1
errors.HAB_006: You don't have access to this habit
errors.MSVC_001: Cannot delete a service with payments. Archive it instead.
errors.MSVC_003: You already have an active service with that name.
errors.MSVC_004: This service is already paid for the current month.
errors.CHRE_001: Cannot delete a chore with logged events. Archive it instead.
errors.BDGT_002: You already have a budget for that month and currency.
errors.BDGT_003: The movement date must fall within the budget's month.
errors.VAL_002: The account currency does not match the budget's.
errors.TSK_004: Some sections do not exist or do not belong to you.
errors.TSK_009: Some tasks do not exist, do not belong to you, or are not in this section.
errors.generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

habits.title: Habits
habits.name: Name
habits.emptyState: You don't have any habits. Create your first one to get started.
habits.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this habit?
habits.deleteWarning: This will also delete the entire log history.

milestones.week: 🔥 One full week with {name}! You're on fire.

monthlyServices.title: Monthly services
monthlyServices.subtitle: Manage your recurring bills (power, water, internet, ...)
monthlyServices.empty: You haven't added any service yet

skipConfirm.title: Skip {name} for {period}?
skipConfirm.body: No movement will be created. The service will advance to the next period.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete {name}?
deleteConfirm.disabledReason: You can't delete a service that already has payments. Archive it instead.

fields.name: Name
fields.frequencyHint: How often it's billed. This can't be changed later.
fields.frequencyHintEdit: Cadence is immutable. To change it, archive this service and create a new one.
fields.estimatedAmountHint: Auto-filled from the average of your payments

budgets.title: Monthly budget
budgets.subtitle: Discretionary spending — only what you log here counts.

empty.title: No budget for {period} in {currency}
empty.subtitle: Define how much you want to spend this month on discretionary stuff and watch your daily allowance day by day.

form.currencyImmutableHint: Currency cannot be changed after creation.
form.amountHint: Total you want to budget for the month (in the chosen currency).

movements.title: Movements
movements.currencyHint: The movement is recorded in {currency} (the budget's currency).
movements.noEligibleAccount: You don't have any active account in {currency}. Create one first.
movements.empty: No movements logged for this month yet
movements.deleteConfirm: Delete this movement? The linked account will be refunded.

delete.title: Delete budget
delete.description: The plan is deleted, but the movements survive as regular expenses in /transactions. The money already moved.

detail.notFound: Budget not found or already deleted.

chores.title: Chores
chores.subtitle: Recurring tasks you do every so often (haircut, clean the pantry, ...)
chores.empty: You haven't added any chore yet

fields.name: Name
fields.nextDueDateHint: Edit manually to re-anchor the rhythm
fields.categoryHint: Optional. Group related chores (Home, Health, Car, ...).

doneForm.title: Mark as done
doneForm.description: Log when you did "{name}". Leave the date as today if it's right now.

skipConfirm.title: Skip this cycle?
skipConfirm.body: Next due will move to {nextDate}. No event is added to the history.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete "{name}"?
deleteConfirm.disabledReason: You can't delete a chore that already has history. Archive it instead.

reports.loadError: Could not load the report. Please try again.

finances.title: Finances report
finances.subtitle: Aggregated view of your accounts and transactions in the selected period.
finances.totalBalanceEmpty: You don't have any active accounts yet.
finances.topCategoriesEmpty: No categorized expenses in the period.

dailyFlow.title: Daily flow
dailyFlow.empty: No movements to chart in this period.

routines.title: Routines report
routines.subtitle: Streaks, today's completion and daily tasks.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.subtitle: TODOs grouped into sections (project-style). Completed tasks clean up at the end of each week.

empty.title: Start by creating your first section
empty.subtitle: Tasks live inside sections. Create one to get going — you can have as many as you need.

section.name: Name
section.colorHint: Optional. Shows as a small dot in the section header.
section.deleteDescriptionEmpty: The section is empty. Delete it?
section.deleteDescriptionWithCount: This section has {count, plural, one {# task} other {# tasks}}. Deleting it will also delete those tasks. Continue?

task.descriptionPlaceholder: Add details in **Markdown** if you want…

quickTasks.title: Priorities
quickTasks.subtitle: What you want to do today. Completed tasks disappear tomorrow; pending ones stay.
quickTasks.descriptionPlaceholder: Add details in **Markdown** if you need…
quickTasks.emptyState: You haven't added any tasks for today yet.
